allow: PowerShell(\(Get-ChildItem "X:\\source\\Ficsit.Schematics\\_reference\\satisfactory-modeler\\images\\icons" -File\).Count; \(Get-ChildItem "X:\\source\\Ficsit.Schematics\\_reference\\satisfactory-modeler\\images\\custom_icons" -File\).Count; \(Get-ChildItem "X:\\source\\Ficsit.Schematics\\_reference\\satisfactory-modeler\\images\\ui_icons" -File\).Count; Get-ChildItem "X:\\source\\Ficsit.Schematics\\_reference\\satisfactory-modeler\\images" -File | Format-Table Name; Get-ChildItem "X:\\source\\Ficsit.Schematics\\_reference\\satisfactory-modeler\\images\\icons" -File | Select-Object -First 15 Name)

PowerShell(\(Get-ChildItem "X:\\source\\Ficsit.Schematics\\_reference\\satisfactory-modeler\\images" -File\).Count; Get-ChildItem "X:\\source\\Ficsit.Schematics\\_reference\\satisfactory-modeler\\images\\ui_icons" -File | Format-Table Name; Get-ChildItem "X:\\source\\Ficsit.Schematics\\_reference\\satisfactory-modeler\\images\\custom_icons" -File | Format-Table Name)

PowerShell($j = Get-Content "X:\\source\\Ficsit.Schematics\\_reference\\satisfactory-modeler\\game_data\\game_data.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $j.PSObject.Properties.Name; "---"; $j.PSObject.Properties | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\): $\(if \($_.Value -is [array]\) { $_.Value.Count.ToString\(\) + ' entries' } else { $_.Value.GetType\(\).Name }\) " })

PowerShell($j = Get-Content "X:\\source\\Ficsit.Schematics\\_reference\\satisfactory-modeler\\game_data\\game_data.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "== Machine sample =="; $j.Machines[0..2] | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6; "== MultiMachines =="; $j.MultiMachines | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6)

PowerShell($j = Get-Content "X:\\source\\Ficsit.Schematics\\_reference\\satisfactory-modeler\\game_data\\game_data.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "== Parts sample =="; $j.Parts[0..5] | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5; "== Recipes sample =="; $j.Recipes[0..3] | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6)
